description_long: This is a tall, slim aluminum can with a matte metallic gold and silver background, decorated with a pattern of white, stylized leaf outlines. The front of the can features the 'WAY 2B LOVE' logo and the product name 'Better Citrus', along with claims such as 'Powered by Premium Plant Sterols' and 'Natural Flavors'. The back of the can displays detailed product information, including a nutrition facts panel, ingredients list, and a QR code. The can is topped with a standard black pull tab, typical of ready-to-drink beverages. The overall design is modern and health-oriented, with a clean, minimalistic aesthetic. The can appears to be filled with a juice-based sparkling water drink.
description: A tall, slim metallic can with gold and silver leaf patterns, black pull tab, and health-focused branding for a citrus juice drink.
description_view_0: The back of the can shows the nutrition facts panel, ingredients, and product information in black and white text.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the gold and silver leaf pattern wrapping around the can, with minimal text visible.
description_view_2: The front of the can displays the 'WAY 2B LOVE' logo, 'Better Citrus' product name, and key marketing claims.
description_view_3: This angled view shows the transition between the patterned side and the information panel, with some branding visible.
